StackView.Name: HeroContent
StackView.TextBlock: A modern UI engine for games and native apps. Compose layouts from grids, stacks, text, and images — all rendered at 60 fps.

TextBlock.Name: TabbedTechHeading
TextBlock.Text: Build the UI, not the ceremony

TextBlock.Name: TabbedTechSubheading
TextBlock.Text: A clean XML surface, Lua where things move, MoonScript when the app grows, and one UI that can travel across targets.

TextBlock.Name: XmlTitle
TextBlock.Text: XML reads like a blueprint

TextBlock.Name: XmlBody
TextBlock.Text: The screen stays legible at a glance, which makes it easy to scan, compare, and reshape as the design evolves.

TextBlock.Name: XmlNote1
TextBlock.Text: • Grids and stacks stay visible in the source.

TextBlock.Name: XmlNote2
TextBlock.Text: • Spacing, padding, and hierarchy remain explicit.

TextBlock.Name: XmlNote3
TextBlock.Text: • The shape of the screen is easy to read before it ever runs.

TextBlock.Name: XmlModelHeading
TextBlock.Text: The structure stays honest

TextBlock.Name: XmlModelLine2
TextBlock.Text: Grid

TextBlock.Name: XmlModelLine3
TextBlock.Text: StackView

TextBlock.Name: XmlModelLine4
TextBlock.Text: TabView

TextBlock.Name: XmlModelLine5
TextBlock.Text: ImageView

TextBlock.Name: XmlModelLine6
TextBlock.Text: TextBlock

TextBlock.Name: LuaTitle
TextBlock.Text: Lua stays close to the surface

TextBlock.Name: LuaBody
TextBlock.Text: The parts that move stay beside the screen that uses them, so interaction and state feel close and easy to change.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: LuaCard1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Tap, click, and selection handling can sit right beside the view that needs it.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: LuaCard2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Small state objects stay local, so the screen remains easy to reason about.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: LuaCard3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Let Lua connect the moving pieces while XML keeps the hierarchy in view.

TextBlock.Name: MoonTitle
TextBlock.Text: MoonScript trims the noise

TextBlock.Name: MoonBody
TextBlock.Text: MoonScript keeps larger app code compact and expressive, while still compiling to the same Lua runtime.

TextBlock.Name: MoonNote1
TextBlock.Text: • Helpful when app modules get a little larger.

TextBlock.Name: MoonNote2
TextBlock.Text: • The syntax stays concise, but the runtime stays Lua.

TextBlock.Name: MoonNote3
TextBlock.Text: • It pairs naturally with XML screens and Lua helpers.

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelHeading
TextBlock.Text: Same runtime, less ceremony

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine1
TextBlock.Text: Cleaner class bodies

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine2
TextBlock.Text: Readable app controllers

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine3
TextBlock.Text: Plain Lua at runtime

TextBlock.Name: MoonModelLine4
TextBlock.Text: Comfortable beside XML layouts

TextBlock.Name: DeployTitle
TextBlock.Text: One UI, many targets

TextBlock.Name: DeployBody
TextBlock.Text: Build once, tune the spacing, and carry the same design language across desktop, mobile, and web-oriented targets.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: DeployCard1
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Best when you want denser information, more breathing room, and precision input.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: DeployCard2
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Responsive spacing keeps the same interface calm and touch-friendly on smaller screens.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: DeployCard3
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: The same screen model can carry into browser workflows without being rewritten.

TextBlock.Name: DeployImage1Title
TextBlock.Text: City glow

TextBlock.Name: DeployImage2Title
TextBlock.Text: Night light

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: CapabilityXml
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: XML first
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Layout stays visible because the screen is described where you can read it.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: CapabilityLua
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Title: Lua behavior
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: Lua handles the moving parts: interactions, state, and small moments of logic.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: CapabilityMoon
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: MoonScript keeps app code compact without changing the runtime underneath.

LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Name: CapabilityShip
LayerPrefabPlaceholder.Card.Body: The same UI model stretches naturally across desktop, mobile, and web-oriented targets.

TextBlock.Name: IterationHeading
TextBlock.Text: A short build loop

TextBlock.Name: IterationSubheading
TextBlock.Text: Edit the XML, tune the logic in Lua or MoonScript, and see the result without changing tools.

TextBlock.Name: IterationWriteBody
TextBlock.Text: Keep layout, spacing, and structure where the screen already lives.

TextBlock.Name: IterationRunBody
TextBlock.Text: Load the app and judge the UI in context instead of from mockups alone.

TextBlock.Name: IterationRefineBody
TextBlock.Text: Tweak assets, trim text, and polish the composition until it feels right.

TextBlock.Name: TargetsHeading
TextBlock.Text: Built to travel

TextBlock.Name: TargetsSubheading
TextBlock.Text: The same Orca app can be tuned for different screens while keeping one visual language.

TextBlock.Name: TargetDesktopBody
TextBlock.Text: Best for dense tools, editors, and dashboards with plenty of room to breathe.

TextBlock.Name: TargetMobileBody
TextBlock.Text: Responsive grids and padding keep touch layouts calm and readable.

TextBlock.Name: TargetWebBody
TextBlock.Text: Ship the same experience into browser-oriented workflows without rewriting the screen.
